Field Description: A unique internal identifier for the user. This is the name the user enters when logging in to your site.
The name of a password adapter, such as PasswordAdapter1, which must match a value defined in System.PasswordAdapters.
The full name of the user. This is the name that appears in the user interface.
The user email address, which is used for sending notification messages. The value must be a simple email address, such as jbenning, without domain or qualifiers.
Business Logic (if any): if no e-mail in the ad.Users table (blank or null)  and not in a production environment then use 'no-email@mtb{environment}.com where environment is either 'cert' or 'dev'

Field Description: Job id for the user
Business Logic (if any): if the user has the "a-ARBxx-BranchUser" user group then blank otherwise "JF00002"

Field Description: A default currency for the user. If this field is null, it defaults to the value specified as Application.Base.Data.DefaultCurrency.
The user's preferred locale. When a user logs in, the preferred locale determines the language for the user interface. Users can change their preferred locale by modifying their user preferences.

The time zone of the user, designated with a standard abbreviation such as PST. If the field is not specified, the system defaults to the server time zone. For example, if a user in Japan does not have a specified TimeZoneId and is working on a server in California, that user is assigned to Pacific Standard Time (PST).
The user's phone number.
Sample Values: First item in array, blank if nothing

Field Description: The user's fax number.
The unique internal identifier of a user. This is the user who is the supervisor of the user you specified in the UniqueName field. This value must match a user defined in SharedUser.csv.
The password adapter for the user specified in the Supervisor.UniqueName field.
Alternate email address of the user.
The user's preferred delivery information ('Deliver To' address).
The unique internal identifier of a purchasing unit. This value must match a purchasing unit defined in PurchasingUnit.csv.
A comma-separated PCard Numbers.
The unique internal identifier of an address. This value must match an address defined in Address.csv.
The unique internal identifier of an address. This value must match an address defined in Address.csv.
Business Logic (if any): If the user has the flag Remote then its�  for Contractors this is blank

Field Description: The procurement approval limit for the user in the default currency for your site. This limit does not apply to expense reports and travel authorizations.
Business Logic (if any): Look up based on their HcmWorkerPublic.LevelCode

Field Description: The expense report or travel authorization approval limit for the user in the default currency for your site.
The unique internal identifier of a company. This value must match a company defined in Company.csv.
The unique internal identifier of a business unit. This value must match a business unit defined in BusinessUnit.csv.
The unique internal identifier of a cost center. This value must match a cost center defined in CostCenter.csv.
The unique internal identifier of a product. This value must match a product defined in Product.csv.
The unique internal identifier of a product. This value must match a product identified in Project.csv.
The unique internal identifier of an account. This value must match an account defined in Account.csv.
The unique internal identifier of a sub-account. This value must match a sub-account defined in SubAccount.csv.
The unique internal identifier of a region. This value must match a region field defined in Region.csv.
UserUUID of the user.

The ImportCtrl field in the CSV files enables you to specify which data to load into the parent site and which data to load into child sites in Federated Process Control systems. Valid values of this field are, Both, Shared , and Partition.
